This SNOMED-CT based include has some concepts with semantic tags (FSN terms) and some without (preferred terms) - check that this is what is intended (examples for FSN: [Abdomen (body structure), Ankle region structure (body structure), Structure of left ankle (body structure), Structure of right ankle (body structure), Structure of precordium (body structure)] and examples for no FSN: [Arteriovenous fistula (morphologic abnormality)])
